overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a foggy, abandoned Soviet-style residential district in a video game. The player moves along a wet, tree-lined path between derelict apartment buildings before encountering a supernatural electrical anomaly and turning to explore a side area with abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban park pathway between apartment blocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central paved path flanked by birch trees and derelict apartment buildings

entered.detail: tall concrete panel apartment block with multiple balconies, weathered and abandoned
tall concrete panel apartment block with dark windows, overgrown with vegetation at base
row of white-barked birch trees with sparse autumn foliage lining the path
row of white-barked birch trees with bare branches lining the path
wet concrete pathway with puddles reflecting the grey sky
wooden park bench partially overgrown with grass
tall black street lamp with curved arm

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate, foggy pathway between abandoned Soviet-era apartment buildings. The camera moves steadily forward along the wet pavement, passing birch trees and empty park benches. The atmosphere is quiet and ominous, with no other characters or movement visible.

events.description: bright electrical anomaly appears in the distance on the left side of the path
electrical anomaly erupts in intense blue-white energy discharge with crackling lightning
camera turns left to face the anomaly directly as it continues to pulse with energy

agents.ego_description: stops forward progress and turns to observe the supernatural electrical phenomenon on the left side of the path

entered.detail: supernatural ball of crackling blue-white electrical energy hovering near the ground

segments.scene_description: A supernatural electrical anomaly suddenly materializes on the left side of the path, crackling with intense blue-white energy. The camera turns to face the phenomenon, which pulses and sparks before beginning to fade. The surrounding birch trees are silhouetted against the bright energy discharge.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential side street with derelict vehicles

events.description: camera turns right onto a side path between the apartment buildings
camera passes close to an abandoned black car on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: turns right off the main path and proceeds along a side route past abandoned vehicles toward a small structure

entered.detail: derelict black sedan with broken windows and rusted body parked on the grass verge
small wooden guard booth or shelter with sloped roof at the end of the path
tall grey concrete wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: After the anomaly fades, the camera turns right onto a narrower side path. An abandoned black car sits rusting on the left verge as the camera moves past it. The path leads toward a small wooden guard booth at the end, with a tall concrete wall on the right and the apartment building facade looming close by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate residential district that shifts from a quiet, foggy walk into a supernatural encounter and a detour through a derelict side area. It begins by moving steadily forward along a wet pavement lined with birch trees and empty benches between looming Soviet-era apartment buildings. As the camera progresses, a supernatural electrical anomaly suddenly materializes on the left, causing the perspective to turn toward the pulsing blue-white energy that silhouettes the nearby trees. Once the phenomenon fades, the camera shifts right onto a narrower side path, passing a rusting black car on the verge. The scene finally closes as the camera moves toward a small wooden guard booth, flanked by a tall concrete wall and the close facade of an apartment building.
